section.heading: Compensation of President pro tempore of Senate

content.p: Whenever there is no Vice President, the President of the Senate for the time being is entitled to the compensation provided by law for the Vice President.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 32 of this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
R.S. § 36 derived from act Aug. 16, 1856, ch. 123, § 2, 11 Stat. 48.

note.heading: Cross References
note.p: Compensation of Vice President, see section 104 of Title 3, The President.
